name: Kadazandusun
notes: Kadazandusun (Central Dusun, Boros Kadazandusun) — Austronesian language of Sabah, Malaysia. Written in the Latin script. GRAPHEME INVENTORY NOT YET SPECIFIED: the standardised Kadazandusun orthography and its phoneme inventory (including the schwa/vowel set and the glottal stop) need documented sourcing before a letter→phoneme table can be asserted. INPUT CONTRACT: input is expected in the Latin-script Kadazandusun orthography.

location.notes: Glottolog's representative point for Kadazan Dusun.
